outlook.volatilityExpectation: LOW: Positive aggregate GEX (1.76B) suppresses volatility. Expect mean-reversion and pinning.
outlook.summary: Price is pinned at a triple Gamma Flip Resonance (634). Dealers are long gamma, incentivized to sell rallies and buy dips. High Monthly PCR (10.22) indicates heavy hedging, suggesting a defined floor. Market is trapped between 630 support and 650 resistance.

levels.motivazione: Perfect alignment of Gamma Flip across 0DTE, Weekly, and Monthly expiries. Primary structural pivot.
Massive Monthly Put OI (112k) creates a 'hard floor'. Coincides with high volume spike.
Monthly Call Wall (16.9k) aligns with heavy 0DTE Call OI (46.6k). Structural ceiling.
Weekly Max Pain level aligned with significant Monthly Put OI (103k). Target for mean reversion.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: High near-term volatility expected as spot oscillates at gamma inflection point. 0DTE negative GEX amplifies intraday movements.
outlook.summary: Spot at critical gamma flip threshold (562.68). 0DTE negative GEX (-0.02B) creates volatile conditions while weekly/monthly positive GEX provides structural stability. Extreme bullish sentiment in 0DTE (PCR 0.45) with reverse smirk skew suggests potential mean reversion toward Max Pain at 570.

levels.motivazione: Spot at 562.58 is essentially AT the weekly gamma flip. Critical inflection point where dealer hedging behavior changes from suppressing to amplifying volatility. This is the most important level for directional bias.
0DTE Max Pain level 1.3% above spot. Strong magnetic attraction as market makers target this level for expiration. Extreme low PCR (0.45) supports upward pin risk.

Secondary 0DTE call wall with 78,973 OI and exceptional volume (93,600). First significant resistance above spot with Vol/OI ratio >1.0 indicating active positioning.
Confluence of 0DTE (23,852 OI) and MONTHLY (11,071 OI) call open interest. Multi-expiry resistance with structural significance.
Monthly gamma flip just 0.25% above spot. Secondary pivot zone providing structural reference with 0.06B positive GEX backing stability.
Primary 0DTE put wall with 11,432 OI. Key support zone 1.3% below spot where dealers provide buying support.
Confluence of 0DTE (8,413 OI) and WEEKLY (5,680 OI) put open interest. Strong support cluster with multi-expiry validation.
Major put confluence with 0DTE (7,676 OI) and WEEKLY (8,599 OI). Deep support zone with elevated Vol/OI ratio indicating hedging activity.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Suppressed - positive GEX environment supports orderly upside drift toward max pain zone
outlook.summary: Spot trades below all major max pain levels (24050-24400). Reverse smirk across all expirations confirms bullish bias with expensive calls. The 24000-24400 zone acts as primary magnetic target. 22800 RESONANCE level provides structural floor. Expect gradual upward drift with dealers supporting rallies.

Major resistance in WEEKLY+MONTHLY (531+92 OI). Confluent with WEEKLY Max Pain. Strong upside cap.
MONTHLY massive ITM put position (1471 OI) creates magnetic pull. Dealers pin price toward this level.
0DTE max pain coincident with gamma flip (24040). Primary intraday target for MM pinning.

WEEKLY gamma equilibrium point. Spot proximity indicates sensitivity - regime change zone.
